positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic depiction of a celestial compass, featuring constellations, stylized astronomical symbols, and geometric patterns. The design should have a clean, thick silhouette on a neutral background, suggesting night sky elements like crescent moons, stylized planets, and ethereal stardust trails. The style should be vintage sci-fi etching mixed with modern bohemian aesthetics, rendered in deep indigo, gold foil accents, and creamy off-white lines. Composition must be perfectly centered, highly symmetrical, and ready for single-color screen printing or embroidery. Clean linework, high contrast, perfect symmetry, graphic novel style, suitable for t-shirt print.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, poor anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, noise, grain, faded, complex background, gradient, low detail
